statements.summary: Supports funding for homelessness initiatives, including shelter revitalization and a one-shelter initiative.
statements.quote: That means that we can put more money to respond to the crisis of those who are unhoused. We secured $64 million from Springfield to build a one-shelter initiative. And now for the first time in over a decade, families are not on a waiting list when it comes to looking for temporary housing. But we also have put $40 million to revitalize shelters so that families can experience housing with some dignity.

statements.summary: Supports expanding accessory dwelling units (ADUs) throughout Chicago.
statements.quote: You know, our ADUs is another good example, another campaign promise and victory, where now we have the ability to expand ADUs throughout the city of Chicago.
